overall.description: A cinematic walk along an ancient Mediterranean harbor at golden hour, featuring stone warehouses, wooden docks, and traditional sailing vessels. The game engine footage showcases warm sunset lighting reflecting off the water as the camera moves smoothly along the waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor promenade with stone warehouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock with stone warehouses on the right and sailing vessels moored on the left

entered.detail: two-story stone buildings with red tile roofs and wooden balconies lining the harbor
weathered wooden pier extending along the water's edge
ancient wooden ship with large tan sail moored at the dock
rocky desert cliffs rising in the background across the water
tall palm trees scattered among the buildings
tall wooden pole with a lantern near the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit ancient harbor promenade with stone warehouses lining the right side. The camera walks steadily along wooden dock planks, passing moored sailing vessels with triangular sails on the left. Rocky desert mountains rise in the distant background under a clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront with moored trireme and sailing vessels

events.description: sun becomes visible over the water, creating golden lens flare and backlighting the scene

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock as the view opens toward the water, facing the setting sun and approaching a large moored vessel

entered.detail: bright golden sun low on the horizon creating lens flare across the water
wooden sailboat with large tan sail approaching on the left side of the dock
large burlap sacks and woven baskets stacked on the dock

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open waterfront view as the stone buildings fall behind. The setting sun becomes visible on the left, casting golden light across the water and creating a warm lens flare. The camera approaches a large trireme ship moored in the center of the harbor while drawing near to a sailing vessel on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock loading area with cargo and merchants

events.description: two robed NPCs come into view standing near the cargo sacks on the right

agents.ego_description: approaching cargo stacks and two standing figures at the end of the dock section

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing near the cargo sacks, facing the water

entered.detail: two characters in long robes standing on the dock near the cargo

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on a dock loading area where large cargo sacks and wicker baskets occupy the right side. Two robed NPCs stand near the cargo, adding life to the scene. The camera moves past the cargo toward the figures while the sailing vessel remains moored on the left, backlit by the setting sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an ancient harbor promenade that transitions from a structured waterfront into a sun-drenched loading dock. It begins by walking steadily past stone warehouses and moored sailing vessels with triangular sails, with rocky desert mountains framing the distant horizon. As the stone buildings fall behind, the scene opens to a wide waterfront view where the setting sun emerges on the left, casting a warm golden lens flare across the water and illuminating a large trireme moored in the center. The camera then shifts toward a bustling dock area, moving past piles of cargo sacks and wicker baskets on the right. Finally, the movement concludes by approaching two robed figures standing near the goods, while the sailing vessels remain backlit by the glowing sunset.
